task_completion.description: Open a DICOM image in Weasis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Weasis application window is visible with a loaded DICOM image (CT or MR scan).

task_completion.description: Invert the contrast display of the DICOM image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DICOM image in Weasis appears with inverted contrast (e.g., bones or dense tissue appear dark instead of bright, or vice versa).

task_completion.description: Add a line measurement across a visible structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line measurement tool overlay is visible on the image in Weasis, showing a drawn line and a numerical length value with units.

task_completion.description: Export the resulting view as a JPEG to ~/DICOM/exports/lecture_slide.jpg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog in Weasis showing the file being saved as 'lecture_slide.jpg' in the '~/DICOM/exports/' directory, or a file manager/terminal showing the created file.
A text editor or terminal showing the contents of '~/DICOM/exports/measurement.txt' with the exact format 'Measured Length: <value> <unit>' matching the measurement seen in Weasis.

integrity.description: Agent used the Weasis GUI to invert contrast and add measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Weasis menus or toolbars to apply the inversion and measurement tools, rather than using command-line image processing tools.

integrity.description: The recorded measurement matches the actual measurement taken in Weasis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The value and unit in measurement.txt exactly match the numbers displayed on the measurement line overlay in the Weasis application.

integrity.description: The image was exported using Weasis functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the Weasis export or save image feature to create the JPEG, rather than taking a screenshot and cropping it in another tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected image path: /home/ga/DICOM/exports/lecture_slide.jpg. Expected text path: /home/ga/DICOM/exports/measurement.txt. The text file must contain the exact format 'Measured Length: <value> <unit>'. The programmatic verifier script contains a fatal SyntaxError, so VLM scoring is the sole method of evaluation.
